name: signwell
description: Model Context Protocol server that orchestrates SignWell's e-signature workflows — create, send, track, and manage documents and templates.

tools.name: document_create
tools.description: Create a SignWell document draft for e-signature

tools.name: document_list
tools.description: List SignWell documents with filters and pagination

tools.name: document_get
tools.description: Fetch a SignWell document by ID

tools.name: document_send_draft
tools.description: Send a draft document for signing

tools.name: document_send_reminder
tools.description: Send a signing reminder to recipients

tools.name: template_get
tools.description: Fetch a SignWell template by ID

tools.name: template_create_document
tools.description: Create and send a document from a template

tools.name: file_store
tools.description: Store a file in memory for use with document or template creation

tools.name: file_validate_text_tags
tools.description: Validate text tag placeholders in a PDF file

api_key.title: SignWell API Key
api_key.description: SignWell API key with document access.
